attributes.action: Require Parliament vote on foreign use of UK bases amid Iran conflict
attributes.additional_details: We put ourselves at huge risk. Following Donald Trump is not ethical.
attributes.background: Require Parliament vote on foreign use of UK bases amid Iran conflict. All MP's must consult constituents & publicly declare their vote decision and reasoning.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Hold an immediate parliamentary vote on US use of UK bases
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762994
